bsky.text: This summer, we kept the lights on all night, every night, at five soccer fields across New York City.  This was the scene at Calvert Vaux Park in Gravesend, Brooklyn Tuesday night.

bsky.name: [giver of problems: pro max✨]
bsky.text:
Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights usually go off at 10pm. 

They set a camera up and guess what they saw?? 

Residents playing soccer with their friends ALL NIGHT. One man said how much he loved it because his friends work late and can’t get to the field
bsky.ko: **맘다니**가 밤새 **축구장 조명**을 켜 뒀다……원래 밤 10시면 꺼지는데. 카메라를 설치해 놓고 봤더니 뭐가 찍혔게? 주민들이 친구들이랑 **밤새도록 축구**를 하고 있더라. 한 남자는 친구들이 늦게까지 일해서 축구장에 못 오는데 이래서 너무 좋다고 했다.

bsky.name: Saint Helena Island Info
bsky.text: Next time you're scrolling, thank the Socialists who made it possible for ordinary people to learn to read and write.

bsky.name: Petra Michaela
bsky.text: Bees are disappearing, and our food supply is beginning to collapse. Plants and animals are vanishing, and life is becoming a desert plain. But if humans were to disappear, nature would slowly heal. Rivers would flow more cleanly, forests would grow again, and wildlife would recl
bsky.ko: 벌이 사라지고 있고, 우리의 식량 공급도 무너지기 시작했다. 식물과 동물이 자취를 감추고, 생명은 메마른 황무지가 되어 간다. 하지만 만약 **인간이 사라진다면** 자연은 서서히 되살아날 것이다. 강물은 더 맑게 흐르고, 숲은 다시 자라나며, 야생은 제자리를…

bsky.name: Ed Kwok
bsky.text: The size of the Boreal Forest in Canada.... it can't be raked....hot dry weather and changing winds from climate change have screwed everything up
bsky.ko: **캐나다 북방림**의 크기라니… 갈퀴로 긁어낼 수 있는 게 아니야…. 기후변화로 인한 덥고 건조한 날씨와 변덕스러운 바람이 모든 걸 망쳐놨다.

bsky.name: ProPublica
bsky.text:
THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend himself.

Then the private school owner encourages all of his peers to attack him, one by one. She hits him, repeatedly, with a plastic pipe-like object.

How does this school still exist — and receive state funds? 🧵
bsky.ko: 스레드: 그 소년은 거짓말쟁이로 몰린다. 스스로를 변호하지도 못하게 한다. 그러더니 **사립학교 원장**은 또래 아이들 모두에게 한 명씩 그를 공격하라고 부추긴다. 그리고 플라스틱 파이프 같은 물건으로 아이를 몇 번이고 때린다. 대체 이 학교가 어떻게 아직도 운영되고, **주 정부 지원금**까지 받는 걸까? 🧵

bsky.name: Daniel Storey
bsky.text:
The World Cup half-time show changes the fabric of the match for pure guff. This is the crime those in power continue to commit: football is not a vehicle for other entertainment. Grow up or piss off.
